description: 183 - 12-04-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson, Jonathan Powell (National Security Adviser, CO) Stephanie Driver (former Director of Communications, No.10) and others
text:
Stephanie Driver (former Director of Communications, No.10) and others

Subject: Fw: Letter from America

Date: Saturday, 12 April 2025 at 13:16:05 British Summer Time
From: Peter Mandelson

To: Jonathan Powell

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Get Outlook for iOS

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
From: Peter Mandelson < Personal >

Sent: Saturday, April 12. 2025 8:15:00 AM

To: Stephanie Driver < Personal

Cc: MMcSweeney Personal <mmcsweeney Personal >
Subject: Re: Letter from America

eK

Thaven’t been asked but if I were, the above is what I would say.
Peter

Get Outlook for iOS

From: Stephanie Driver < Personal >
Sent: Saturday, April 12. 2025 1:30:56 AM
To: Peter Mandelson < Personal >

Subject: Re: Letter from America
OFFICIAL

Much appreciated, Peter, thank you.

You may see a projected timetable for the deal in UK media today - 'a few days away’ - this
was a misstep by a cabinet member on background. My team is diluting expectation.

Steph

Stephanie Driver | Director of Communications - Delivery [10 Downing Street | London SW1A
2AA | Email: Personal

530

Peter

Lord Mandelson
HM Ambassador, Washington DC.
Personal

RK
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
